uiCockpits.description: Data Cloud UI provides release readiness cockpits for PHR and Digital Marketing products

features: Statistics cards (Total Releases, Passed, Failed, Average Score)
Evidence categories summary with status indicators
Release history table with version, target, verdict, score, timestamp
Filter by release target (ALL, production, staging, development)
Release details sheet with blocking gaps, below-target dimensions, full evidence
Integration with release selection from history tab
Statistics cards (Total Releases, Passed, Failed, Average Score)
Evidence categories summary with status indicators
Connector status (Google Ads) displayed in evidence categories
Release history table with version, target, verdict, score, timestamp
Filter by release target (ALL, production, staging, development)
Release details sheet with blocking gaps, below-target dimensions, full evidence
Integration with release selection from history tab

potentialEnhancements: Add foundation usage display similar to PHR local cockpit
Add next steps tab with actionable tasks
Add environment-specific filtering at the API level
Add export functionality for evidence reports
Add trend visualization for release scores over time
Add comparison view between different releases
Add alert integration for blocking issues
Add role-based access control for sensitive evidence

differences: Local PHR cockpit has foundation usage section (Kernel, Data Cloud, Plugins)
Local PHR cockpit has next steps tab with required work tasks
Local PHR cockpit has gate status tab with environment badges
Data Cloud cockpit has release history with filtering
Data Cloud cockpit uses centralized release readiness service
Data Cloud cockpit supports multi-tenant context

getReleaseReadinessStats.description: Fetch release readiness statistics across all products
getReleaseReadinessStats.returns: ReleaseReadinessStats with byProduct breakdown and averageScore

listReleaseReadiness.description: List release readiness records with filtering

summary.foundationUsageDisplayNote: Available in local PHR cockpit only
summary.nextStepsDisplayNote: Available in local PHR cockpit only
summary.gateStatusDisplayNote: Available in local PHR cockpit only
